text.title: Scope Creep Parking Lot Protocol Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml or to the universal skip-this-methodology conclusion.

decision-tree.root-question: Session has ad-hoc asks AND outcome must be auditable?

conclusion.verdict: Run protocol with verbatim capture + visible canvas.
Canvas must be visible during meeting; private notes forbidden.
Enforce 24h triage + 48h response SLAs; ageing alerts to PM.
Capture only; never classify scope live.

example.description: When the situation matches the leading branch, apply the referenced rule; otherwise traverse to the next condition until the default branch is reached.
